versions.name: Camp Durant
versions.address: 4637 Old Carthage Rd. Carthage, North Carolina 28327

provenance.notes: Name corrected 2026-07-22 (community/data-quality review): 'Summer Camp 2026 at Camp Durant' was a scraped registration-event title; renamed to the property name, verified against the council's camp listing. Prior id 'nc-summer-camp-2026-at-camp-durant' retired (resolves via aliases.json). Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
